payload.title: Never show the marketing landing for local or signed-in users
payload.description: Local `scope serve` (non-cloud) already serves the app at / (verify + keep). On the hosted hub, a signed-in visitor to / currently sees the marketing landing — they should go straight to /app. FIX: in cloud mode, if the request to / carries a valid session, redirect to /app; only logged-out visitors see the landing. Confirm the local-parity guard still holds (no landing, no /auth routes, app at /).
